summary: Retest ImageCropperDialog + ImageUpload fixes from iteration_28. All 5 fixes (2 bugs + 3 code-review comments) verified end-to-end via Playwright.

fixes_verified.evidence: After save with zoom=1.4/rotation=10, reopening cropper with new file shows aria-valuenow=1 for zoom and aria-valuenow=0 for rotation. Aspect returns to 1:1.
text 'JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP до 15MB' visible (count=1); '5MB' no longer present (count=0).

fixes_verified.desc: getCroppedBlob null-guard in handleSave with toast

fixes_verified.evidence: ImageUpload.jsx lines 130-133: onOpenChange callback calls setCropSrc(null) when v is false.

fixes_verified.desc: Removed misleading 'или перетащите файл'; new copy 'Нажмите для загрузки изображения'
fixes_verified.evidence: 'перетащите файл' count=0; 'Нажмите для загрузки изображения' count=1.

regression_flow: PASS — Login admin/220066 → /admin/menu → 'Позиция' → file input (accept=image/*) → cropper opens with 5 aspect presets (1:1, 4:5, 3:4, 16:9, Свободно), zoom slider, rotation slider, Сбросить, Отмена, Сохранить и загрузить → save triggers POST /api/upload → toast 'Изображение загружено' → preview image rendered.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for {DialogContent}' still appears for the parent 'Новая позиция' menu-item dialog (not for cropper — cropper already has DialogDescription). Consider adding DialogDescription to the item edit dialog for a11y.
Pre-existing WebSocket 400 errors on /api/ws/{id} unrelated to this feature.
seed_data_creation: /tmp/test400.png and /tmp/test500.png (PIL solid-color images for two-file upload flow).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All ImageCropperDialog fixes confirmed. Test flow: login → /admin/menu → click first 'Позиция' button → image file input is the one with accept starting 'image/jpeg' (page still has 2 file inputs; the other is menu-import JSON). Use Radix slider [role=slider] + ArrowRight key to bump values (zoom step=0.05, rotation step=1). aria-valuenow reflects state.
